---
id: get-person-avatar
title: "Get a person's avatar info (initials, gravatar)"
description: "Returns JSON with avatar metadata for client-side rendering. Always returns a result even if no photo is uploaded."
sidebar_label: "Get a person's avatar info (initials, gravatar)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/private/churchcrm-private-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a person's avatar info (initials, gravatar)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/person/{personId}/avatar"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns JSON with avatar metadata for client-side rendering. Always returns a result even if no photo is uploaded.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
